prompts.text: "Rhythm" — a pattern of sounds in time. "Beat" — the steady pulse underneath the music, like a heartbeat.
Clap or tap the beat together as notes approach: this builds the physical feel of rhythm before the key press.
Ask: "Can you feel when the note is about to arrive? What helps you know?"
After a good run, say: "You kept the beat! That means your timing was right — well done."
